vibe: Professional, clear, premium, trusting. Uses a mix of crisp 'Swiss' layout principles with 'Organic' color warmth to avoid feeling overly sterile.

rules.h1: font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem); letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1.1; font-weight: 700; font-family: var(--font-heading); color: var(--text-main);
rules.h2: font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.5rem); letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-heading); color: var(--text-main);
rules.h3: font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.3; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-heading); color: var(--text-main);
rules.body: font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--font-body);

surfaces_and_components.cards: background: var(--bg-surface); border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: 12px; padding: var(--space-6); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
surfaces_and_components.buttons_primary: background: var(--green); color: white; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease;
surfaces_and_components.glass_header: background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light); z-index: 50; position: sticky; top: 0;

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: var(--space-6);
layout_strategies.course_detail_split: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 380px; gap: var(--space-12); align-items: start;

hero_image.description: Student studying with a laptop. Use in Landing page hero.

login_background.description: Modern library architecture. Use as the left-panel background image in the Login/Signup screen.

course_thumbnails.description: Laptop displaying code. Use as a thumbnail for tech courses.
Workspace with laptop. Use as a thumbnail for business/productivity courses.
Student working on Macbook. Use as thumbnail for design/marketing courses.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Tailwind CSS is NOT installed and MUST NOT be used. Write pure CSS classes in styles.css and apply them as className in App.js.
Update standard CSS variables in styles.css to match the design_system colors provided above. Ensure --green and --green-dark remain the brand focal points.
Add `@import` for Outfit and Manrope Google fonts at the top of styles.css.
Refactor generic `div` soup into semantic HTML tags (`main`, `section`, `header`, `nav`).
For the Landing page hero, ensure the text overlay does not get lost on the hero image; use a linear-gradient overlay or place text on a solid color block.
All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, dashboard tabs) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="enroll-button"`).
Use Lucide-react for all icons; ensure they have consistent sizing (e.g., size={20}) and stroke-width.
Dashboard tables/grids should utilize the bento grid format (gap-6) and avoid full-screen stretching unless necessary.
Make sure hover states are correctly applied with transitions for all cards, buttons, and links.
